query_records.query:
SELECT g.source_id, g.ra, g.dec, g.phot_g_mean_mag, g.phot_bp_mean_mag, g.phot_rp_mean_mag, g.parallax, g.parallax_error, g.pmra, g.pmra_error, g.pmdec, g.pmdec_error, g.pmra_pmdec_corr, g.astrometric_excess_noise, g.astrometric_excess_noise_sig, g.ruwe, g.ipd_frac_multi_peak, g.ipd_frac_odd_win, g.phot_bp_rp_excess_factor, g.matched_transits, g.visibility_periods_used, g.astrometric_n_good_obs_al, g.scan_direction_strength_k4, c.radius_sersic, c.n_sersic, c.flags_sersic, c.classprob_dsc_combmod_galaxy, c.classprob_dsc_combmod_quasar
        FROM gaiadr3.galaxy_candidates AS c
        JOIN gaiadr3.gaia_source AS g USING (source_id)
        WHERE c.radius_sersic IS NOT NULL
          AND 1 = CONTAINS(
              POINT('ICRS', g.ra, g.dec),
              CIRCLE(
                  'ICRS', 172.53135, 9.27667,
                  1.8497922473996455
              )
          )
        ORDER BY g.source_id

              POINT('ICRS', g.ra, g.dec),

              CIRCLE(
                  'ICRS', 353.12654, 17.556625,
                  1.6854916861585316
              )
          )
        ORDER BY g.source_id

SELECT g.source_id, g.ra, g.dec, g.phot_g_mean_mag, g.phot_bp_mean_mag, g.phot_rp_mean_mag, g.parallax, g.parallax_error, g.pmra, g.pmra_error, g.pmdec, g.pmdec_error, g.pmra_pmdec_corr, g.astrometric_excess_noise, g.astrometric_excess_noise_sig, g.ruwe, g.ipd_frac_multi_peak, g.ipd_frac_odd_win, g.phot_bp_rp_excess_factor, g.matched_transits, g.visibility_periods_used, g.astrometric_n_good_obs_al, g.scan_direction_strength_k4, c.radius_sersic, c.n_sersic, c.flags_sersic, c.classprob_dsc_combmod_galaxy, c.classprob_dsc_combmod_quasar
        FROM gaiadr3.galaxy_candidates AS c
        JOIN gaiadr3.gaia_source AS g USING (source_id)
        WHERE c.radius_sersic IS NOT NULL
          AND 1 = CONTAINS(
              POINT('ICRS', g.ra, g.dec),
              CIRCLE(
                  'ICRS', 136.25188393539904, 36.341911211706,
                  1.6854916861585316
              )
          )
        ORDER BY g.source_id
